title: Nami and Chopper Protect the Kids
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Mocha, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Children. The central beat is nami and chopper protect the kids.
scene: The scene focuses on nami and chopper protect the kids, with Unknown person #1, Mocha, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Children shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Now! Let's go! Into the Biscuit room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!! crap!! They went that way!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Let's go to the Biscuit Room!!

dialogue.speaker: Mocha
dialogue.text: We can eat then candy!! Caaandy!! Caaandy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How did this happen to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Tell us what's going on, chopper!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm so glad you're here...!!! Caesar, he...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: We're back in the Biscuit Room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They'll do anything to get to it!!!

summary: Nami and Chopper Protect the Kids. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
